ValidationRule.description: If all the required fields has value and status is not started.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK( Date__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( PM_Vehicle__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Inspection__c )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Wheels_Tyres__c , "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Lights_and_reflectors__c , "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Windscreen_Mirrors_Wipers__c , "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Structure_Body_Fluid_Systems__c , "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Brakes__c , "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Load_Restraint__c , "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Trailer_Checks_Done__c , "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Dollies_Check_Done__c , "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Hauling_Trailing_Equipment_Roadworthy__c , "")), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Completed")), $Profile.Name = "Driver Communities Profile" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please change the status to Completed.
